title: Improved survival with vemurafenib in melanoma with BRAF V600E mutation
abstract: Seeded fallback metadata: patients with metastatic melanoma carrying the BRAF V600E mutation had clinical response and improved outcomes with vemurafenib compared with dacarbazine. This local seed is used only when live literature retrieval is unavailable.

title: EGFR mutation and resistance of non-small-cell lung cancer to gefitinib
abstract: Seeded fallback metadata: EGFR T790M in non-small-cell lung cancer is associated with acquired resistance to gefitinib. This local seed is used only when live literature retrieval is unavailable.

title: Alectinib in ALK-positive non-small-cell lung cancer
abstract: Seeded fallback metadata: ALK fusion positive non-small-cell lung cancer can show response and sensitivity to ALK inhibition with alectinib. This local seed is used only when live literature retrieval is unavailable.
